title: Add Agent Factory progress monitor and logic trace
summary: Introduced a live progress monitor in Agent Factory to expose current stage, elapsed runtime, and logic trace events for AI Draft and Generate flows.
changes: Added operation state and timing for draft/generate lifecycle tracking.
Added timestamped logic trace collection and bounded history.
Rendered progress monitor panel with stage + elapsed seconds + logic feed.
Instrumented both action handlers with explicit stage transitions.
risks: Additional client state updates during operations may add minor render overhead.
rollback: Remove monitor state/helpers and panel from AgentFactoryModal.
